bindings.quest_action: track down the escaped prisoner before it regroups
bindings.quest_focus: the trail leading from the holding cells
bindings.quest_stakes: the safety of the settlement and everyone in it
bindings.quest_threat: a dangerous creature that killed two sentries during its escape
bindings.quest_time_pressure: every hour it gets farther away and more entrenched

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, stop. We have an emergency and I need someone who can move fast.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} broke free from the holding cells last night. It took {quest_item} from the armory and headed {location_hint}. We lost the trail at the river crossing, and {quest_time_pressure}. {target_npc} is organizing a perimeter, but we need a tracker to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Time is against us. Will you take up the hunt?

playerResponses.text: Show me where you lost the trail. I'll pick it up.
What's in it for me if I catch this thing?
Not my problem. Hire a bounty hunter.

bindings.quest_action: track the pack to their den and wipe them out
bindings.quest_focus: the organized raids on outlying farms
bindings.quest_stakes: the farms and the people who depend on them
bindings.quest_threat: an organized pack that hits at night and vanishes before dawn

dialogueChunks.intro: You there, {player_name}. I can see from your gear that you know how to handle yourself. Good. We need that right now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} has been raiding {quest_stakes} for weeks. Three farms hit in the last four days alone. We've found their tracks leading {location_hint}, but every patrol I send comes back empty-handed. These aren't ordinary {enemy_type}: they're organized, hitting at night and vanishing before dawn. I need someone who can {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Before the next farm they hit has people in it instead of animals.

playerResponses.text: Organized predators? I know how to break a pack. Let's move.
I'll hunt them, but I keep whatever I find in their den.
Your patrols should handle this. It's not my fight.

bindings.quest_action: follow the spy's trail and cut off the information flow
bindings.quest_focus: intercepted coded messages about our defenses
bindings.quest_threat: a spy feeding our defense plans to the enemy
bindings.quest_time_pressure: before the next attack is launched

dialogueChunks.intro: Keep your voice down, {player_name}. What I'm about to tell you doesn't leave this room.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} to a {enemy_type} warband. {target_npc} intercepted {quest_focus} last night: the next attack is being planned as we speak. The spy was last seen heading {location_hint}. We need someone to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Stealth and speed, {player_name}. Find the source and cut it off.

playerResponses.text: I'll shadow the trail and find their contact.
Spy hunting is delicate work. I expect proper compensation.
This sounds like a job for your own intelligence people.

bindings.quest_action: pursue the raiders and recover the stolen cargo
bindings.quest_stakes: the supplies the settlement desperately needs
bindings.quest_threat: raiders who are fast but dragging heavy cargo
bindings.quest_time_pressure: before they disappear into the wilds

dialogueChunks.intro: Drop what you're doing, {player_name}. {quest_focus} was hit an hour ago and the attackers are still close.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A band of {enemy_type} ambushed a supply caravan and made off with a shipment of {quest_item}. They killed the driver and wounded three guards. {target_npc} followed the blood trail {location_hint} before they were forced to turn back. {quest_threat}, but they're dragging heavy cargo. That slows them down. I need you to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every minute we stand here talking, they get farther away. I need a hunter, not a committee. Are you that hunter?

playerResponses.text: Heavy cargo means deep tracks. I'll catch them before sundown.
Recovering stolen goods is bounty work. What's the rate?
Chase bandits through hostile terrain? Hire a mercenary company.

bindings.quest_action: intercept the deserter before the documents reach the enemy
bindings.quest_focus: stolen defense documents and sensitive intelligence
bindings.quest_stakes: every wall and fortification we've built
bindings.quest_threat: a deserter carrying our secrets to the enemy
bindings.quest_time_pressure: before those papers reach the warband

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}. Good. I need someone with a sharp eye and a steady hand. We have a deserter.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} who abandoned their post last night and fled toward {location_hint}. Normally I'd let the fool go, but they took {quest_focus} about our defenses. If those papers reach the {enemy_type} warband, {quest_stakes} become useless. {target_npc} confirmed they were spotted heading through the eastern pass at dawn.
dialogueChunks.outro: Bring back the satchel. The deserter can answer for their choices later: {quest_focus} are what matter.

playerResponses.text: I'll intercept them before they reach the warband. Consider it done.
Chasing deserters through enemy territory. Lovely. What's my pay?
Your internal problems are not my business.

bindings.quest_action: track the alpha to its lair and put it down
bindings.quest_focus: the claw marks and kill sites near the settlement
bindings.quest_stakes: the farmers who won't leave their homes after dark
bindings.quest_threat: an alpha predator that's moved dangerously close
bindings.quest_origin: something driving it out of its usual territory

dialogueChunks.intro: Listen closely, {player_name}. I'm only going to explain this once because we don't have time to repeat ourselves.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Something has been killing livestock and dragging carcasses into the ravines. Not wolves, not bears: something bigger. {target_npc} found {quest_focus} {location_hint} that match a {enemy_type} alpha. If {quest_threat} has settled this close, {quest_origin} must be to blame. Either way, I need you to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes} anymore. End this before someone gets killed.

playerResponses.text: An alpha predator near the settlement? I'll track it to its lair.
Big game hunting is premium work. Pay accordingly.
That sounds like a creature I don't want to meet. No thanks.

bindings.quest_action: catch the smuggler at the exchange and shut down the pipeline
bindings.quest_focus: a smuggling operation running through our territory
bindings.quest_stakes: the security of every settlement in the region
bindings.quest_threat: a smuggler arming enemy warbands with our own resources

dialogueChunks.intro: I've been waiting at this crossroad for two days hoping someone competent would pass through. {player_name}, you'll do.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} has been running {quest_item} through our territory and selling it to {enemy_type} warbands in exchange for safe passage. {target_npc} intercepted a dead drop message revealing {quest_focus}. The next exchange happens {location_hint}. If we can {quest_action}, we shut down the whole pipeline.
dialogueChunks.outro: This isn't a straight fight: it requires patience, tracking, and the willingness to act fast when the moment comes. Can you handle that?

playerResponses.text: Catch them at the exchange. Clean and decisive. I can do that.
Smugglers are slippery. This will cost you more than a standard bounty.
Stakeouts and smuggling rings are too complicated. Pass.

bindings.quest_action: find the ambush predator and end the killings
bindings.quest_focus: the pattern of deliberate roadside murders
bindings.quest_stakes: the trade routes that are dying as travelers avoid the area
bindings.quest_threat: a methodical killer stalking isolated travelers
bindings.quest_origin: three deaths in the past week alone

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I'll be blunt. A killer is on the loose and our guards can't find them.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin}: three travelers found dead on the roads, stripped of their {quest_item} and left in the ditches. {quest_focus} is too deliberate for random attacks. {target_npc} examined the scenes and believes we're dealing with {quest_threat} that studies the roads and strikes when victims are isolated. The latest attack was {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes}. Nobody will travel alone anymore. I need you to {quest_action}.

playerResponses.text: A methodical killer? I'll study the pattern and set my own trap.
Serial ambushes are grim work. I'll do it, but don't expect me to enjoy it.
Walking into a killer's hunting ground alone sounds like becoming victim number four.
